settings_audio_desc: Play background music (looping) or sound effects via tags: # music: filename and # sound: filename
settings_image_desc: Display an image above the story text via tag: # image: filename. Clears when a new image tag is encountered.
settings_linkopen_desc: Open a URL in the browser via tag: # linkopen: url
settings_memory_desc: Enables the save and restore buttons in the player toolbar.
settings_scrollafterchoice_desc: Automatically scroll to new content after making a choice.
settings_fadeforline_desc: Reveal new lines one by one with a delay after each choice. Adjust the delay with the Line delay slider below.
settings_cdbutton_desc: Adds a cooldown to a choice button via tag: # cd:N (N = seconds). The button is disabled for N seconds after clicking.
settings_autobutton_desc: Automatically selects a hidden choice after a delay via tag: # auto:N (N = seconds). Useful for timed sequences.
settings_autosave_desc: Automatically save the story state when the # autosave tag is encountered.
options_linedelay_desc: Time in seconds between each line appearing when Animate lines is enabled.
